violations.text: A guest with a non-service animal (dog) was observed shopping in facility. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The receptacle in the women's and gender-neutral toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Food is stored on shelving that is not at least 6 inches off the ground in the walk-in and stock room. Cases of beverages were observed on the floor in the walk-in; Cases of food observed on the floor in the stock room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The floor under shelving in the walk-in has an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The handwashing sinks in the toilet rooms are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the Fresh & Fast refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
Food observed stored on shelves in the walk in cooler that are not at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2024
